mapper.insert: insert into `like` (user_id, target_id, target_type, createtime) values (#{userId}, #{targetId}, #{targetType}, now())
mapper.delete: delete from `like` where user_id = #{userId} and target_id = #{targetId} and target_type = #{targetType}
mapper.select: select * from `like` where user_id = #{userId} and target_id = #{targetId} and target_type = #{targetType}
